import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let token = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    result = list.push(result, n)
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn binary_search(_ nums: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = nums.len() - 1
  while lo <= hi
    let mid = lo + (hi - lo) / 2
    let val = match nums.get(mid)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      return None
    end
    if val == target
      return Some(mid)
    else if val < target
      lo = mid + 1
    else
      hi = mid - 1
    end
  end
  None
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(l)
  l
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(l)
  l
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

match binary_search(nums, target)
when Some(idx)
  print("index=#{idx}")
when None
  print("not_found")
end
